sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65799" key="melaina/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελαινάς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">άδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n65799.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a blackish fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">161</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
